enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from his Boulder apartment on March 3, 2016, recapping a late night working on a migration/math web page and organizing playlists for his new Legend of Sanctimonium YouTube channel. He also discusses recently buying marijuana and wax concentrates, expresses a preference for weed over shatter for lung health, and briefly mentions an upcoming medical diagnosis appointment with his mom.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Prefers weed over shatter/concentrates because concentrates are harsh and bad for the lungs
Prefers only moderate highs for videos; getting too high degrades video quality

entities: small pet animal (held in hand, possibly a gecko)
